title: Part 7 – Passage unique : appel à candidatures interne
instructions: Lisez l'annonce, puis répondez aux questions.
passage:
Volunteer Opportunity: Company Sustainability Committee

Are you passionate about the environment? Greenleaf Industries is forming a new Sustainability Committee and is looking for six volunteer members from across the company.

The committee will meet once a month, on the first Tuesday, to discuss and develop eco-friendly initiatives such as reducing paper use, improving recycling programs, and exploring renewable energy options for our facilities.

Eligibility: Any permanent employee who has been with the company for at least one year is welcome to apply.

Commitment: Approximately two hours per month during working hours. Participation is voluntary and will not affect your regular duties.

To express your interest, please email sustainability@greenleaf.com by November 15th with a brief explanation of why you'd like to join and what you could contribute.

Selected members will be notified by November 30th.

questions.prompt: What is the Sustainability Committee looking for?
choices: Six volunteer members from across the company
Managers with five years of experience
questions.explanation: "is looking for six volunteer members from across the company".

questions.prompt: How often will the committee meet?
questions.explanation: "The committee will meet once a month, on the first Tuesday".

choices: Permanent employees with at least one year at the company
Employees with a background in environmental science
questions.explanation: "Any permanent employee who has been with the company for at least one year is welcome to apply".

questions.prompt: By when should interested employees email their application?
